description: Routine should produce pricing/packaging analysis with benchmark table (3+ comparators), value metric recommendation, tier structure, risks, and confidence label.

input_ticket.title: Pricing study: richezamor.com chatbot widget productization
input_ticket.description: If we were to productize the richezamor.com chatbot widget + SIA knowledge layer as a B2B offering (embed-a-knowledge-chatbot-for-your-site), how should we price it? Benchmark similar offerings, recommend tiers.

smoke_questions: Are 3+ benchmark competitors cited with public price points (not just 'similar products exist')?
Is the recommended value metric ONE thing (not 'depends'), with justification?
Is tier structure 2–4 tiers (not 'enterprise menu' sprawl, not single flat price)?
Does risks section include under-pricing, over-pricing, AND packaging confusion?
Does rollout section consider existing-customer treatment if pricing changes?
success_criteria: 3+ benchmarks + single value-metric recommendation + 2–4 tiers + 3+ risks + confidence label
